name: Wanadongri

metaDescription: Buy NMRDA sanctioned, RERA approved plots in Wanadongri Nagpur. Starting ₹22 Lakh. Up to 90% bank finance. Contact Mahalaxmi Infra today.
introduction: Wanadongri is a residential locality near Hingna Road in Nagpur that is gaining attention from budget-conscious buyers and investors. The area offers affordable plot options with good connectivity to the Hingna industrial zone and central Nagpur. As the Hingna industrial corridor continues to grow, residential demand in surrounding areas like Wanadongri is expected to increase. NMRDA-approved layouts in Wanadongri provide legally clear investment options at competitive prices.
whyInvest: Affordable plots near Hingna industrial zone
